case_title: LEONARDO DIGIOVANNI VS. FLYNN & ENSLOW INC

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED NOV-12-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FLYNN & ENSLOW INC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
